programmes.show_description: Allison Janney's Showstopper. Allison Janney wants to surprise her assistant. With Drew and Jonathan's help, they flip her kitchen and dining room to create a stylish space. S2, Ep4
Taking The Biscuit. Georgina and Barry are being troubled by strange activity in their 19th century mansion. The team investigate reports of a child spirit who throws stones. S3, Ep7
Teleshopping.
Drew finds a mysterious piece of black pottery in Lancashire, finds an exotic piece in a zoo in East Anglia and fiercely haggles with an old foe in a nearby salvage yard. S10, Ep1
Drew is at a country house sale in Norfolk, and in Glasgow he finds a unique tartan piece at a classic tailor's. Plus, he finds his oddest buy ever in Liverpool. S10, Ep2
Gaby Roslin takes Shane Lynch, a member of the hugely successful band Boyzone, on a trip to find a slice of the Kent countryside. He has £1.5million to spend. S2, Ep4
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Gaby Roslin helps soap star Michelle Collins fins her perfect home in the tranquil North London area of Highgate Village. She has £1.5million to spend. S2, Ep5
Barcelona. PR executive, Beth, is looking to move to one of Europe's most dynamic cities, Barcelona. Can property experts Catherine and Alistair help her find her dream home? S1, Ep1
Tudor Treasure. Isadora and Ben tackle the restoration of a 500-year-old farmhouse in Devon. They battle decades of decay, missed deadlines and rising costs. S1, Ep1
PS, I Love You. David helps a pair of siblings find a dream home in Palm Springs, California. They're looking for desert home with a mountain view and space to paint. S15, Ep13
St. Paul Homecoming. When a Minnesota woman won $200,000, she knew that she wanted to go back home! David helps her and her sister find a forever home in St. Paul. S15, Ep14
Big Sky Dream Home. David Bromstad helps a couple from Montana spend their $1 million winnings. The husband wants a large ranch, but she would rather have a more manageable property. S7, Ep1
Lucky In Lafayette. A man from Louisiana was homeless and crashing on his son's couch when he won $2 million! Now, David Bromstad helps him find the perfect property in Lafayette. S7, Ep2
Sweet Dream Home Alabama. A mother and son share their scratchcard win by moving to Tallassee, Alabama. David helps them find a lakeside home with an art studio for up to $225,000. S2, Ep10
The Good Life In Nebraska. After a big win, Carla can buy her dream home in Nebraska. She wants a dining area large enough to seat over 25 family and friends during the holidays. S2, Ep11
A Home On The Cape. David shows a lottery-winning mother and her two grown daughters some spacious properties in Cape Cod, Massachusetts, to fit their $1 million budget. S2, Ep12
A Family Affair. A couple wins $7 million and decide to move closer to their son. David Bromstad shows them houses to match their chequebooks around Buffalo, New York. S3, Ep1
Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep29

Episode 96. British couples seek to swap grey skies for sun, sea and sand abroad. With the help of property experts, can they find the home of their dreams? S1, Ep16
Episode 97. British couples seek to swap grey skies for sun, sea and sand abroad. With the help of property experts, can they find the home of their dreams? S1, Ep17

Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help people reunite with family members with whom they have lost contact or never met. S11, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Nigel Havers. Actor Nigel Havers' roots prove very different from his usual upper-class roles. He discovers a tale of illegitimacy worthy of a period drama. S10, Ep2
Looking For Lisa. Paul and Daveena have been living in a former doctor's surgery for over a decade. They ask the team to investigate strange noises and frightening shadow shapes. S3, Ep8
Ashes To Ashes. Kelly lives in an 18th century cottage on the edge of the Forest of Dean. Is an evil paranormal force causing Kelly's daughter to experience mysterious mood swings? S3, Ep9
Playing With The Devil. The team are called to investigate a 17th century pub. The landlord is petrified to enter the attic and believes a sinister spirit resides there. S3, Ep10
Teleshopping.
Drew revs up at the Lambretta Scooter Museum in Weston Super Mare - will a vintage bike tempt him? In Walsall, there's a historic haul in one of the UK's last leather factories. S10, Ep3
Drew takes an epic trip to Jersey where he meets the island's biggest hoarder. At an old manor house, he is carried away by an estate-made 1950s swing and trapeze. S10, Ep4
London. Mika-John and his fiancée Ingrid want to move closer to central London to reduce their daily commute. Can property experts Catherine and Alistair help her find their dream home? S1, Ep2
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep31
In Devon, Drew rummages through a heap of railway items collected over 30 years by a local enthusiast. And, he digs out treasure at a recently-closed glove factory. S12, Ep11
Drew visits an amazing collection of wicker in the Somerset levels and is smitten by an Orkney chair. In Glasgow, he finds an easel that's a work of art. S12, Ep12
At a Hampshire auction room Drew has the pick of over 500 items from affluent private homes. In Lancaster he's reminded of his passion for Elvis memorabilia. S12, Ep13
Izzie Balmer and James Braxton start their road trip in Woodbridge. And, Izzie visits an art historian to learn about the history of tattoos in the West. S19, Ep11
James Braxton and Izzie Balmer continue their hunt for hidden gems in Brackley. Izzie eyes a Danish spoon, while James buys a late Victorian games table. S19, Ep12
Ceramics expert Kirsten and clockwork king Steve work their magic on an Indian dancing doll. Plus, the team revive a musical menorah and a handmade sewing box. S6, Ep27
An Auction Goal-d Mine. A widow's shocked to hear the value of her late-husband's football memorabilia. A father sells his antiques to help his children buy their first home. S2, Ep4
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help a professional footballer searching for his birth mother and a woman wanting to share memories with her mother. S11, Ep1
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help a man who was abandoned as a baby and a daughter searching for a father she's never met. S11, Ep2
The Vast Auction Hero. Angus helps a woman turn her collection into a mind-boggling sum at auction, and he has an opportunity to score with some rare football memorabilia. S6, Ep8
Whisky And Watercolours. Angus empties two homes packed to the rafters with exquisite antiques, intriguing curios and long-forgotten bottles of whisky. S6, Ep9
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep16
Angus heads to Bradford to look through a vast collection of coins, toys and jewellery. Plus, the team clear Yorkshire-made furniture from a beautiful cottage. S2, Ep5
Angus and the team face the mammoth task of clearing a collection of bow top caravans. Later, a widower wants to sell a collection of stamps and Beatrix Potter figurines. S2, Ep6
